overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia riding a horse through a rural countryside. The journey traverses open grasslands, crosses a wooden bridge, passes stone ruins, and travels through a small village with wooden architecture. The scene features bright morning lighting with scattered clouds and lush green vegetation.

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding a horse at steady pace along a winding dirt path through grasslands

entered.detail: winding dirt path through tall grass
calm lake visible through trees on the right side
rustic wooden farm building with thatched roof
tall evergreen trees lining the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt riding through open grasslands on a dirt trail. A lake is visible to the right through scattered trees, while a wooden farmhouse appears on the left as the horse approaches a rural settlement area.

events.description: crossing a wooden bridge over a small waterway

agents.ego_description: Geralt guiding the horse across a wooden bridge and past farm structures

entered.detail: rustic wooden plank bridge with rope railings crossing water
tall wooden post with birdhouse mounted on top near the path
ancient stone wall ruins partially covered in vegetation
weathered stone walls lining the path

segments.scene_description: The horse crosses a wooden bridge over a stream, passing a distinctive birdhouse on a pole. Ancient stone ruins and walls begin to appear along the path as the farmstead is left behind.

events.description: deer appears on the right side of the path and runs alongside

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding through an area with stone ruins, approaching a village with houses visible ahead

notable_agents.action: deer running alongside the path through the grass

entered.detail: cluster of wooden village houses with thatched roofs
rustic wooden post fences marking property boundaries

segments.scene_description: The path continues past ancient stone walls and ruins as a village comes into view ahead. A deer appears on the right, running parallel to the path. Wooden fences line the approach to the settlement.

events.description: horse slows slightly while navigating through the village area

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding through the village center, passing wooden houses and fenced properties

notable_agents.action: deer standing near the path before moving away

entered.detail: small wooden hut near the lakeshore

segments.scene_description: The horse moves through the village center, passing wooden houses and fenced yards. A deer stands near the path on the right before moving away. The lake becomes visible again in the distance as the village is traversed.

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding away from the village into open grasslands, maintaining a steady canter

entered.detail: large boulder and rock formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the path opens into wide grasslands again. The trail continues through tall grass with scattered trees and rock formations, returning to the open countryside setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from open grasslands through a rustic village and back into the wild countryside. It begins with Geralt riding along a dirt trail past a lake and a wooden farmhouse before the path leads across a wooden bridge and past a birdhouse on a pole. As the farmstead recedes, the environment shifts toward ancient stone ruins and walls, with a deer running parallel to the path as wooden fences signal the approach to a settlement. The camera then moves through the village center, passing wooden houses and fenced yards, before the lake reappears in the distance as the horse exits the town. Finally, the scene opens back into wide grasslands, with the trail winding through tall grass and scattered rock formations.
